Home.title: Split shared costs without making people sign up.
Home.description: Create a group, invite members with a private write link, add expenses in JPY, and settle up with a simple recommendation list.
Home.featureOneBody: A random slug plus write token grants edit access. The database stores only the token hash.
Home.featureTwoBody: Amounts stay integer-safe, selected participants split equally, and 1-yen remainders are distributed deterministically.
Home.featureThreeBody: Everything important fits on a phone: members, expenses, balances, settlement, and CSV export.

GroupForm.title: Create group
GroupForm.description: Start with a group name and optional member list. You can add more members later.

GroupPage.publicViewHint: This public link opens the group page by slug only.
GroupPage.writeAccessBody: Paste the write token to unlock mutations for this browser.
GroupPage.writeAccessReady: This browser already has write access. Share the full write link only with collaborators you trust.
GroupPage.writeAccessStepOne: 1. Open the public group page with the slug link.
GroupPage.writeAccessStepTwo: 2. Paste the write token to unlock adding, editing, or deleting data.
GroupPage.writeAccessStepThree: 3. The token stays server-checked; this browser only keeps an access cookie.
GroupPage.accessPlaceholder: Paste write token or full write link
GroupPage.deleteExpenseHint: Delete this expense if it was entered by mistake or needs to be removed entirely.
GroupPage.expenseNotesPlaceholder: Any note you want to keep in the original language.
GroupPage.emptyMembers: Add at least one member before recording expenses.
GroupPage.unlockExpenseHint: To add the first expense, unlock write access above with the group write token.
GroupPage.addMemberFirstHint: Add the first member above, then you can record expenses and calculate balances.
GroupPage.unlockMembersHint: Viewing is public. Editing members still requires the write token.
GroupPage.balancesIntro: Each balance shows how far each member is from even after all recorded expenses.
GroupPage.settlementIntro: Review the records, compare balances, then use the suggested transfers to settle the group.
GroupPage.rawExpensesIntro: These are the source expense entries currently included in the calculation.
GroupPage.recommendedTransfersIntro: These transfers use a simple greedy matching between debtors and creditors.
GroupPage.shareSummary: {count, plural, one {Split with # person} other {Split with # people}}

Feedback.invalidGroup: Please enter a group name. Member lines can be left blank, but each filled line must be valid.
Feedback.invalidMember: Enter a valid member name before adding someone.
Feedback.invalidExpense: Please complete the expense form and select at least one participant.
Feedback.invalidAmount: Amount must be a whole-number JPY value.
Feedback.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
